assumptions: This is a preliminary estimate — label as such in all client communications
Cost per sqm source: market benchmark for commercial_hotel in BCS/Todos Santos — MXN 25,000–40,000/sqm range, midpoint MXN 32,500/sqm used
Base construction cost = 3,000 sqm × MXN 32,500 = MXN 97,500,000

Client budget of $3.5M USD (~MXN 60.2M at 17.2 rate) is approximately 49% of the preliminary construction estimate — budget gap requires discussion; client indicated openness to phasing and value engineering
Seed data provides explicit architecture fee of USD 420,000 — this figure is used in the SOW payment schedule per Tomás instructions
